subject: [COMMON] fix logic of post upgrade hook script to handle upgrade run without any changes to charts that could cause loss of all data.
commit_message:
[COMMON] fix logic of post upgrade hook script to handle upgrade run without any changes to charts that could cause loss of all data.

Issue-ID: OOM-2442
Signed-off-by: Marat Salakhutdinov <marat.salakhutdinov@bell.ca>
Change-Id: Ifd3bbc0f63e95b1c8797ecd09a891195faafc8c2

Patch Set 5:

I improved logic of post-upgrade hook script. Now at the end of it it is checking if mariadb is up and running on proper "prod" pod and only afterwards is deleting temporary deployment. Now I think setup should work properly.
